titlestmt.titleproper: Cornell University. Office of the Vice Provost4-2-1264
titlestmt.author: Compiled by M. S

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-12-08 23:17:07 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University. Office of the Vice Provost

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Office of the Vice Provost

did.abstract: Includes correspondence, reports, and office files.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence, reports, and office files concerning research grants; research facilities; computers at Cornell; departments and divisions within the University; faculty and students; faculty committees and Faculty Council; University Council; and other Cornell programs and topics.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University Office of the Vice Provost records, #4-2-1264. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.

did.unittitle: Current Status and Future Development of Agriculture
